mapper.sql: id, menu_name, parent_id, sort, path, component, perms, icon, menu_type, visible, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_menu
AND menu_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{menuName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY parent_id, sort

SELECT
FROM sys_menu WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY parent_id, sort
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu ( menu_name, parent_id, sort, path, component, perms, icon, menu_type, visible, status ) VALUES ( #{menuName}, #{parentId}, #{sort}, #{path}, #{component}, #{perms}, #{icon}, #{menuType}, #{visible}, #{status} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_menu
menu_name = #{menuName},
parent_id = #{parentId},
sort = #{sort},
path = #{path},
component = #{component},
perms = #{perms},
icon = #{icon},
menu_type = #{menuType},
visible = #{visible},
status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != ''

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 AND m.menu_type IN ('M', 'C') ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.sort

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.parent_id, m.sort
